## Meeting Purpose

[Train Wiets on Upwork contract management for content writers.](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Created new milestone for 20 articles at $850 each ($17,000 total) for existing writer](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Upwork milestone process: create → writer accepts → funds held in escrow → release payment when work completed](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Wiets likely to handle Upwork contracts moving forward; further training planned](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

## Topics

### Upwork Contract Management

  - [Accessed "Hire Talent" → "Talent I've Hired" to find existing writer's profile](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Current milestone still in progress; Ada will notify when to release payment](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Added new milestone: 20 articles, $850 each, totaling $17,000](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Milestone creation doesn't require immediate payment; funds sit in escrow](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - ["Active and Funded" status indicates milestone is set up and awaiting work completion](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Upwork Interface Navigation

  - [Milestone creation usually prompts funding page (didn't occur this time)](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [System sends contract to writer for acceptance](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Once accepted, typically prompts to select funding account for escrow](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)

### Team Roles and Training

  - [Uncertainty about who will manage Upwork contracts long-term](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Wiets likely candidate for handling contracts due to current team size](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Molly to discuss with Bridget about role distribution and further training needs](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Molly to consult with Bridget about task allocation and Wiets' training needs](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Wiets to potentially take over Upwork contract management](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Monitor current writer's progress for payment release (Ada to notify)](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Await writer's acceptance of new milestone for 20 articles](https://fathom.video/share/QnQ4qfE47Cuoh9Dn6WBxL4xtaiexhxye?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
